nodes.name: ⏱ Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: Triggers the pipeline every 30 minutes. Can also be triggered manually or via webhook.

nodes.name: 🤖 Agent 1 — Extraction
nodes.notes: Runs ECM pack simulation (WLTP profile) with 25% fault injection. Outputs extraction_output.jsonl

nodes.name: 🔍 Agent 2 — Anomaly Detection
nodes.notes: Applies 14 cell-level + 4 pack-level anomaly rules. Outputs anomaly_output.jsonl

nodes.name: 🏷 Agent 3 — Classification
nodes.notes: Classifies records as normal/warning/critical with confidence scores. Outputs classification_output.jsonl

nodes.name: ⚡ Agent 4 — Decision
nodes.notes: Assigns decisions (ignore/monitor/review/escalate/shutdown) with priority P0-P4. Outputs decision_output.jsonl

nodes.name: 🔀 Confidence Router
nodes.notes: Routes records to escalation_queue, human_review, or auto_approve. Saves 4 JSONL files + manifest.

nodes.name: 📄 Read Manifest
nodes.notes: Read routing manifest to check drift alerts and escalation count.

nodes.name: 🧮 Parse Manifest
nodes.notes: Extracts escalation count, shutdown events, drift alerts from manifest JSON.

nodes.name: 🚨 Shutdown Events?
nodes.notes: Routes to P0 alert if any shutdown events detected.

nodes.name: ⚠️ Escalations?
nodes.notes: Routes to P1 alert if escalation queue is non-empty.

nodes.name: ✅ Build Info Message
nodes.notes: Builds info message when pipeline completes with no escalations.

nodes.name: 📝 Log Alert
nodes.notes: Logs alert to n8n_alerts.jsonl. In production: replace with Email/Slack node.

nodes.name: 🧠 Feedback Loop
nodes.notes: Builds RLHF dataset from human reviews. Exports JSONL, CSV, HF format, and stats.

nodes.name: 🏁 Pipeline Complete
nodes.notes: Marks pipeline run as complete. Check dashboard at localhost:8501.

nodes.name: 🌐 Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: Alternative trigger via HTTP POST to /webhook/hitl-ops-trigger. Useful for CI/CD integration.

_readme.author: Prateek Gaur
how_to_import: 2. Go to Workflows → Import from file
pipeline_flow: → Check Escalations? → P1 Alert / Info → Log
